lead.description: * [Digital Marketing](https://www.startupcompanycounsel.com/digital-marketing.php) * [Legal Services](https://www.startupcompanycounsel.com/legal-service.php) * [Business Advisory](https://www.startupcompanycounsel.com/advisory.php) * [Startup Blogs](https://www.startupcompanycounsel.com/blog/) * [Contact US](https://www.startupcompanycounsel.com/contact-us.php) * [About US](https://www.startupcompanycounsel.com/about.php) * [](tel:415802-2839) * [![Startup Company Counsel](https://startupcompanycounsel.com/img/logo.png)](https://www.startupcompanycounsel.com/) * [Home](https://www.startupcompanycounsel.com/) * [Services](https://startupcompanycounsel.com/) * [Legal](https://startupcompanycounsel.com/legal-service.php) * [Business Advisory](https://startupcompanycounsel.com/advisory.php) * [Digital Marketing](https://startupcompanycounsel.com/digital-marketing.php) * [SEO Services](https://startupcompanycounsel.com/seo-services.php) * [SMM Services](https://startupcompanycounsel.com/smm-services.php) * [PPC Services](https://startupcompanycounsel.com/ppc-services.php) * [About](https://startupcompanycounsel.com/about.php) * [Blog](https://www.startupcompanycounsel.com/blog/) * [Contact Us](https://startupcompanycounsel.com/contact-us.php) * [Book a Consultation](https://startupcompanycounsel.com/book-a-consultation.php) ## StartUp Company Counsel provides the highest quality legal, business and marketing services for startups and growing companies. Starting your own business should be an exciting time, but the ground work involved is frequently not that exciting for business owners. StartUp Company Counsel is a one-stop shop for businesses big and small seeking business counsel, legal advice, and marketing assistance. Comprised of experienced business attorneys, marketing experts, business advisors, and blockchain professionals, StartUp Company Counsel has the answers to any questions or needs a blossoming business may have. [Book A Consultation](https://startupcompanycounsel.com/book-a-consultation.php) ## Legal We customize legal solutions to help meet your objectives, including processing the associated documents and filings. Our experienced StartUp attorneys help identify issues that you may not yet have considered, and can advise you in making important decisions on otherwise complex topics. As your business grows, we are well-suited to meet your growing legal needs. [Read More](https://startupcompanycounsel.com/legal-service.php) ## Business Advisory We will advise you in developing your products and your market strategy to advance your company goals and maximize market opportunities. Focusing on trends ushering in new waves of technologies and applications, we also handle development and transitional roles, including customized service and product development, capital formation, business plans, venture funding, M&A, strategic partnership and commercial transactions. [Read More](https://startupcompanycounsel.com/advisory.php) ## Digital Marketing We can help bring your ideas to reality and provide impressive digital experiences by sourcing the right talent, connecting your business with the right audiences, and driving relevant traffic. By modernizing your operations, helping manage your reputation, and optimizing advertising spend,we can help you establish and market your business effectively. [Read More](https://startupcompanycounsel.com/digital-marketing.php) [ Previous ](https://startupcompanycounsel.com/#introCarousel) [ Next ](https://startupcompanycounsel.com/#introCarousel) ### Welcome To **StartUp Company Counsel** StartUp Company Counsel was established to provide founders and entrepreneurs a complete suite of services that will help your company navigate the changing legal landscape, overcome market barriers, and succeed in your competitive market. We will be your one-stop shop for your legal, business and marketing needs. We work as the outsourced in-house counsel, business advisors and marketing strategists for new businesses and developing organizations. While our clients have unique financial situations and business goals, many share a focus on raising capital, connecting with strategic partners, and generating revenue. Through all these business activities, our team of professionals will work with you to understand the specific issues and challenges you face and help you plan your strategies. Our goal is to guide our clients where they need the most assistance, whether legal, business, marketing, or all of the above, so that they can work on their strengths and focus on achieving their business objectives. The three Silicon Valley-based companies with decades of experience have teamed up to work as one unit to meet your business needs. We bring the appropriate skills and experience to the challenges at hand.
